Footer.description: Investment consultancy specialized in wealth protection, securities investments, real estate auctions and business consulting.
Footer.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to know more about Vanilla Capital services.

metadata.title: Vanilla Capital - We invest in your future
metadata.description: Investment consultancy and financial services. Wealth protection, securities investments, real estate auctions and business consulting.

hero.title: We invest in your future
hero.subtitle: Specialized consultancy in investments and wealth protection to build the tomorrow you desire.

strategicPartners.title: Strategic Partners
strategicPartners.description: Invest with transparency through the most renowned financial institutions in the market.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete solutions for your investment and wealth management needs

retirement.title: Retirement Planning
retirement.description: We preserve the wealth you've worked hard to build.
retirement.subDescription: Our team brings deep experience in retirement planning and tailored strategies. We help you define goals, diversify income sources, and adjust your plan as life changes, so you can retire with confidence.

patrimonial.title: Wealth Protection
patrimonial.subDescription: Protecting your assets is at the core of what we do. We develop customized strategies using legal structures and planning tools to shield and preserve your wealth across generations.

auction.title: Real Estate Auction
auction.description: We buy properties below market value.
auction.subDescription: We regularly acquire properties through our auction experience and knowledge of the real estate market. We secure exclusive opportunities, perform detailed due diligence, and support clients through each stage of the process.

assets.title: Asset Allocation
assets.description: We help you capture returns in markets we know well.
assets.subDescription: Our approach balances risk and return with a focus on long-term performance. We help you achieve solid results in stocks, funds, and other financial assets through disciplined, professional management.

aiSolution.title: AI Solution for Business
aiSolution.description: We automate your operations and align them with the latest technology.
aiSolution.subDescription: We review your processes and improve them using cutting-edge AI tools. From automation to analytics, we help your company run more efficiently and stay competitive in modern times.

consulting.title: Business Financial Advisory
consulting.description: Strategic guidance for financial and governance decisions.
consulting.subDescription: We support companies with tailored advice on financing, capital structure, mergers and acquisitions, and long-term planning. Our work focuses on clear analysis and practical steps to strengthen your financial position.

metadata.title: About Us - Vanilla Capital
metadata.description: Meet the Vanilla Capital team, specialists in investment consultancy and wealth management.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: A team of specialists dedicated to building our clients' future

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Vanilla Capital is a Brazilian investment consultancy specialized in helping our clients understand how to invest their money for the future. We offer wealth protection services, securities investments, real estate auctions and business consulting, always focusing on excellence and building lasting relationships.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Experienced professionals committed to our clients' success

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: We are ready to help you achieve your financial goals
Contact.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to know more about Vanilla Capital services.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Message sent successfully! We will contact you soon.

metadata.title: Compliance and Documents - Vanilla Capital
metadata.description: Compliance documents, code of ethics and conduct, trading policy and reference form in accordance with CVM regulations.

Compliance.title: Compliance and Documents
Compliance.subtitle: Mandatory documents according to CVM regulations available for download

compliance.title: Compliance Policy
compliance.description: Document that establishes the compliance guidelines and procedures of Vanilla Capital, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards.

ethics.title: Code of Ethics and Conduct
ethics.description: Code that defines the ethical principles and standards of conduct expected from all employees and partners of the company.

trading.title: Personal Trading and Investment Policy
trading.description: Policy that establishes the rules and procedures for personal trading and investments of employees.

reference.title: Reference Form
reference.description: Reference form with information about the company, services offered and contact details.

info.title: Important Information
info.description: All documents are in compliance with CVM regulations and are regularly updated. For more information, please contact us.
